name: ask_user
description: Block on a clarifying question to the user. The host process (CLI or service) receives the question on the configured ask-user socket, prompts the human, and writes back the answer. If no socket is configured (FABRI_ASK_USER_SOCKET unset), falls back to reading the answer from stdin -- handy for CLI dev. Use when the model genuinely needs a human decision (ambiguous scope, missing input, branch-point), NOT to fish for approval.
